name: Bean Burrito Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large saucepan, combine the tomato sauce, water, garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder, and cornstarch. Stir constantly until the mixture boils and thickens for about 7 minutes.
3. Spread 1 cup of the enchilada sauce in the bottom of a covered casserole dish.
4. Roll up tortillas seam-side down with beans, rice, and green onions inside. Place each roll at the bottom of the casserole dish.
5. Pour any remaining enchilada sauce over the rolled tortillas. Cover and bake for 30 minutes.
The recipe can be made without brown rice by using 5 cups mashed cooked and drained beans instead. The sauce may also be used in other Mexican dishes.
